animation_intent.intent: 主角山田律的动作传达：疲倦却正在松动的紧绷感。idle体现微弱呼吸感，不刻意放松但也不再抗拒；happy/react_jump是他第一次真正感到轻盈的瞬间；sad保持内敛，不夸张崩溃；wave是他逐渐习惯被接纳的轻松姿态。
animation_intent.interrupt_policy: idle can be interrupted by any emotion animation; emotion animations play full then return to idle

bones.notes: small nod for idle; larger tilt for surprised

animations.gameplay_state: standing still during puzzle or dialogue
animations.silhouette_note: Subtle breath lift; chibi proportions keep silhouette stable

animations.gameplay_state: positive puzzle outcome or NPC bond moment
animations.silhouette_note: Arms raise on peak; chibi jump arc readable at 256x512px
Quick head pop back; eyes wide expression handles rest via expression layer

animations.gameplay_state: NPC memory moment or island grief beat
animations.silhouette_note: Gentle head bow + arm droop; healing not melodramatic

animations.gameplay_state: greeting or departure from NPC scene
animations.silhouette_note: Right arm wave; small wrist flick adds warmth without aggression

animations.gameplay_state: ritsu-specific: first reaction to beauty/smell moment (Ch3 花田)
animations.silhouette_note: Quick full-body startle then open posture; ritsu-only animation

animation_intent.intent: ひなた的动作精准克制，像她的手账一样——每个动作都是「刚好够」。idle有轻微的翻页感；happy是控制系统松开一瞬间的漏出；sad是防御机制收紧而非崩溃；wave是她允许被接触的罕见时刻。

animations.silhouette_note: Notebook slight tilt as she breathes; her precision shows in minimal movement
Smaller than ritsu's jump; her happy is contained warmth not exuberance

animations.gameplay_state: memory of grandfather / inner conflict moment

animation_intent.intent: 健三动作沉稳，有老渔夫的厚重感。idle是「潮水不急，人也不急」的微呼吸；所有情绪动作幅度小、重心稳；wave是他最高表达，但依然不张扬。

animations.gameplay_state: standing at dock or net sorting

animations.silhouette_note: Barely visible nod; for kenzo a nod IS exuberance

animation_intent.intent: 梅子动作有陶艺师的沉着和手感。idle略微前倾，像在观察什么；happy带着手艺人满足感的点头；wave时有一种「你终于明白了」的温和。
夏帆动作像她对植物的观察——极细致，先停半拍，再动。idle有微微的重心转移，像在倾听什么；happy是她递出那束花时的温柔；surprised很小但真实；wave是她最直接的一次姿态。
冬子动作带着灯台守遗孀的笃定和温度。idle是每晚在灯台旁站着的那种静；happy是她把物品保管好交还时的满足；sad是「他不在这里」而非「他走了」的哀而不伤；wave是六十五年的人生给出的最大祝福。

animations.silhouette_note: Minimal breath; she is at peace

render_previews.render_unavailable_reason: DragonBones Pro is available (detected_capabilities.dragonbones_pro=true) but requires project file creation in DragonBones IDE; automated scripted 2D transform renderer not yet wired. Keyframe specs provided for human animator or future automated pass.

acceptance.automation_limit_note: DragonBones Pro available but requires IDE project creation. All animation specs are complete as ai_transform_json. Keyframe sheet specs provided. Human animator or future scripted render pass can produce final GIF/HTML previews from these specs without creative decisions.
acceptance.next_action: Feed layered-character-reference.json and skeletal-animation-plan.json to DragonBones Pro for final atlas and project file creation. Then art-qa node validates output.
